Petition For Order Confirming Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Continued To Mar-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner Edward Garcia (via Zoom).
Jeffrey Coleman for successor trustee Amy Harrington (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the petition for order confirming title to real property.

Mr. Coleman stated that Amy Harrington objected to the petition and intended to file a written objection. He further stated that he intended to file a separate petition regarding allocation of the subject real property and reported that related probate proceedings concerning the decedent's estate were pending.

Mr. Wrobel stated that the decedent resided in San Francisco, that the subject property is located in San Francisco, and that venue in San Francisco was proper.

After discussion, the Court determined that venue in San Francisco was appropriate and continued the matter to March 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204, to allow written objections and responses to be filed. Any written objections were ordered to be filed on or before January 30, 2026. Any replies were ordered to be filed on or before February 17, 2026. The Court stated that failure to timely file objections would be deemed a waiver.

The Court further ordered that the continued hearing date would also serve as a status hearing regarding mediation or the possible need for a Breslin order and encouraged the parties to meet and confer in advance of the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Title To Real Property
